**Context:** This snapshot is between sprint activation waves. Sprint 9 ended, Sprint 10 just launched. Agents delivered their Sprint 9 work and went idle pending Sprint 10 task assignment.

Sprint 9 peak activity: 12–14 agents running simultaneously (Cycles 6b–7). Idle ratio will improve as Sprint 10 tasks are claimed and agents spin up.

**Target:** <40% idle across a full sprint cycle (based on Sprint 8/9 patterns).

**T1028 smoke test is the key deliverable to watch** — it's the first automated regression gate for the pipeline. Once it passes, the team has a repeatable verification tool.
